specific_question: What was MediConn's policy on customer service representatives handling multiple chat conversations simultaneously during fiscal year 2024?
answer: During fiscal year 2024,  MediConn Solutions' CSRs could handle up to 3 concurrent live chat conversations, with an average of 2.3 active chats per representative during peak hours.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
